steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The second sentence explains a critical obstacle: Ice Ages erase geological evidence. The third sentence states the consequence—geologists couldn't confirm the theory until the 1960s. The transition must link these: cause leads to consequence.

steps.title: Match the consequence transition
steps.content: ”Hence” expresses a result flowing from prior cause—the evidence destruction explains why confirmation took until the 1960s. The other three either add information, suggest contrast, or mark time sequence without establishing this causal link. That matches choice A — A is correct.
